R2: executed_by(tree, 'check document upload', 'Tax Manager') or executed_by(tree, 'check document upload', 'Financial Controller')
R5: condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(resolutionProposalCreated == true) and (cbReportAvailable == true) and (ldReportAvailable == true)', 'analyse reports')
R6: executed_by(tree, 'create resolution proposal', executed_by_return(tree, 'analyse reports'))
